ideation: This sequence mimics the action of carefully peeling a kiwi fruit. The animation will focus on the hands, using the robot's arm joints to create a delicate and precise movement. Frame 1 shows both hands slightly raised and angled towards the center, preparing to hold the fruit. Frame 2 shows the right hand moving slightly forward to mimic the act of peeling the kiwi. Frame 3 shows both hands moving down and away from the body, as if the peeling is complete and the fruit is being set down. Frame 4 shows both hands returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms held slightly forward, ready to peel
right hand begins to grip and peel the fruit
both hands move down and away, peeling complete
arms return to a neutral, relaxed state
